cc:Work.dc:title: Shelf - CardHolder
cc:Work.dc:description:
Shelf for holding (multiple) piles of playing cards / notes
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes CardHolder --Stackable_angle=60 --Stackable_bottom_stabilizers=0.0 --Stackable_height=2.0 --Stackable_holedistance=1.0 --Stackable_width=4.0 --Grooved_arc_angle=170 --Grooved_gap=0.1 --Grooved_interleave=0 --Grooved_inverse=0 --Grooved_margin=0.3 --Grooved_style=arc --Grooved_tri_angle=30 --Grooved_width=0.2 --FingerJoint_style=rectangular --FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=1.0 --FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0 --FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0 --FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0 --FingerJoint_finger=6 --FingerJoint_play=0.0 --FingerJoint_space=6 --FingerJoint_width=1.0 '--sx=65*3' --y=85 --h=40 --outside=0 --angle=10 --stackable=0 --thickness=3.0 --burn=0.1 --format=svg --labels=0 --labels=1 --reference=100.0 --tabs=0.0 --qr_code=0 --inner_corners=loop --spacing=0.5 --debug=0 Command line short: boxes CardHolder --Grooved_arc_angle=170 --FingerJoint_finger=6 --FingerJoint_space=6 '--sx=65*3' --y=85 --angle=10 --stackable=0 --spacing=0.5 Url:
